title: Next 1000 Major Changes
summary: A plain-language planning system that tracks the next 1000 major changes across five stable work lanes and adds required content-output tracking to every planned change.

lanes.title: CP truth, ABPath anchors, source mapping, and review status
lanes.wave_goal_prefix: This lane settles the reviewed CP and AP teaching truth for

lanes.title: Tutorials, curriculum, studio content, and content parity
lanes.wave_goal_prefix: This lane brings the learner-facing content into line with the reviewed truth for

lanes.title: Learner wording, navigation, study flow, and reference-page clarity
lanes.wave_goal_prefix: This lane makes the study experience clearer and calmer for

lanes.title: Workups, diagnostic paths, route behavior, and workup tests
lanes.wave_goal_prefix: This lane keeps workups and route behavior dependable for

lanes.title: Contracts, checks, reports, proof files, and release evidence
lanes.wave_goal_prefix: This lane turns the landed work into proof bundles and review-ready records for

waves.title: Freeze the current truth baseline
waves.goal: Lock the current CP and AP teaching truth before more promotion work lands.
waves.wave_sync_rule: Finish source truth first, then content parity, then learner wording and workup behavior, and only then freeze proof bundles and release language.

waves.title: Reconcile raw mappings with reviewed mappings
waves.goal: Close the gap between raw source matches and reviewed teaching matches.
waves.wave_sync_rule: Finish source truth first, then content parity, then learner wording and workup behavior, and only then freeze proof bundles and release language.

waves.title: Publish the canonical CP study map

records.title: Freeze the current baseline for freeze the current truth baseline: baseline truth map
records.why_this_matters: A clean baseline keeps later review work tied to measured truth instead of memory. This wave focuses on truth baseline, CP anchors, canonical study map.
records.current_problem: The current state is easy to overstate because multiple generated and public surfaces move together. The current wave focus is freeze the current truth baseline.
records.done_when: The wave starts from a written baseline that matches the current repo outputs and review state. The result should support cp truth work for freeze the current truth baseline.
records.wave_sync_rule: Finish source truth first, then content parity, then learner wording and workup behavior, and only then freeze proof bundles and release language.

records.title: Correct the source map for freeze the current truth baseline: reviewed source links
records.why_this_matters: Wrong source mapping spreads drift into study pages, proof bundles, and review packets. This wave focuses on truth baseline, CP anchors, canonical study map.
records.current_problem: Some mapped relationships still depend on earlier assumptions, duplicated labels, or broad matches. The current wave focus is freeze the current truth baseline.
records.done_when: The source map for this wave points to the reviewed teaching truth and removes the current mismatch. The result should support cp truth work for freeze the current truth baseline.
records.wave_sync_rule: Finish source truth first, then content parity, then learner wording and workup behavior, and only then freeze proof bundles and release language.

records.title: Bring the main content into line for freeze the current truth baseline: study truth table
records.why_this_matters: Learners and reviewers need the visible content to match the reviewed source decisions. This wave focuses on truth baseline, CP anchors, canonical study map.
records.current_problem: The main content still carries older wording, older grouping, or older routing assumptions in places. The current wave focus is freeze the current truth baseline.
records.done_when: The main content and the reviewed source map agree for the wave focus. The result should support cp truth work for freeze the current truth baseline.
records.wave_sync_rule: Finish source truth first, then content parity, then learner wording and workup behavior, and only then freeze proof bundles and release language.

records.title: Improve the study page wording for freeze the current truth baseline: public truth wording
records.why_this_matters: Plain language removes avoidable friction for learners, faculty reviewers, and sponsors. This wave focuses on truth baseline, CP anchors, canonical study map.
records.current_problem: Some public or roadmap wording still sounds internal, technical, or overly abstract. The current wave focus is freeze the current truth baseline.
records.done_when: The public wording reads like a study page, review packet, or product demo instead of software notes. The result should support cp truth work for freeze the current truth baseline.
records.wave_sync_rule: Finish source truth first, then content parity, then learner wording and workup behavior, and only then freeze proof bundles and release language.

records.title: Lock the rules to the work for freeze the current truth baseline: review rules
records.why_this_matters: The repo needs the written rules to stay aligned with the behavior that is actually being shipped. This wave focuses on truth baseline, CP anchors, canonical study map.
records.current_problem: Rules, proof messages, and public wording can drift apart when only one surface is updated. The current wave focus is freeze the current truth baseline.
records.done_when: The rule files and the changed behavior are aligned and describe the same result in plain language. The result should support cp truth work for freeze the current truth baseline.
records.wave_sync_rule: Finish source truth first, then content parity, then learner wording and workup behavior, and only then freeze proof bundles and release language.

records.title: Expand the proof checks for freeze the current truth baseline: truth checks
records.why_this_matters: Focused checks prevent the same drift from returning in a later wave. This wave focuses on truth baseline, CP anchors, canonical study map.
records.current_problem: Some important paths still rely on memory or manual spot checks instead of repeatable proof commands. The current wave focus is freeze the current truth baseline.
records.done_when: The wave has a repeatable proof path that fails when the targeted drift returns. The result should support cp truth work for freeze the current truth baseline.
records.wave_sync_rule: Finish source truth first, then content parity, then learner wording and workup behavior, and only then freeze proof bundles and release language.

records.title: Add a targeted test or review check for freeze the current truth baseline: mapping test coverage

records.current_problem: The current safety net does not fully cover the wave’s most error-prone move. The current wave focus is freeze the current truth baseline.
records.done_when: A focused test or check proves the wave’s most important promise. The result should support cp truth work for freeze the current truth baseline.
records.wave_sync_rule: Finish source truth first, then content parity, then learner wording and workup behavior, and only then freeze proof bundles and release language.

records.title: Refresh the reusable output for freeze the current truth baseline: board-prep truth output

records.wave_sync_rule: Finish source truth first, then content parity, then learner wording and workup behavior, and only then freeze proof bundles and release language.

records.title: Clear the next source of drift for freeze the current truth baseline: next mapping risk
